examples: However, it was his rebelliousness in the end that caused him to be expelled.
Music cis a regular theme in his work, especially the rebelliousness of rock 'n' roll.
Yet this excessive rebelliousness is often the effect that too much authority has on spirited pupils.
But if conformity is something you really do want, conformity can be just as authentic as rebelliousness.
Politicians being who they are, the bitter rebelliousness in his party may give way to guilty, sentimental loyalty.
